summary: API League Fixtures Import Feature Testing Complete - Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: League creation shows all 3 options after cache clear. Admin panel code correctly configured for API-type leagues.

test_1_national_league_no_regression.description: National league home/standings still work identically
evidence: Backend tests test_national_home_works and test_national_standings_works passed

test_2_api_league_creation.description: Creating a league with match_source_type='api' works correctly
evidence: Owner_id correctly set to creator's user_id

test_3_owner_access_fixtures_leagues.description: League owner of API-type league can access /api/admin/real-fixtures/leagues

test_4_owner_access_fixtures_search.description: League owner of API-type league can access /api/admin/real-fixtures/search
evidence: Returns list of Serie A fixtures

test_5_owner_can_import_own_league.description: League owner can import fixtures into their OWN API-type league

test_6_non_owner_blocked.description: Non-owner user CANNOT import into someone else's API-type league
evidence: Error: 'Solo il creatore della lega o un super admin può importare partite'

test_7_non_admin_blocked_national.description: Non-admin user CANNOT import into national league
evidence: POST /api/admin/real-fixtures/import returns 403 for non-admin importing to national

test_8_super_admin_can_import_anywhere.description: Super admin CAN import into any league including API-type
evidence: POST /api/admin/real-fixtures/import returns 200 for super admin on any league

test_9_admin_v3_shows_api_leagues.description: Admin V3 leagues endpoint shows API-type leagues with _can_manage_matches=true
evidence: GET /api/admin/v3/leagues returns API league for owner
Super admin sees all leagues including national and API

test_10_frontend_league_creation_form.description: League creation form shows 3 options: Lega Nazionale, Partite da API, Scelte dal creatore
evidence: Screenshot confirms all 3 source type options visible
Options: 'Lega Nazionale', 'Partite da API', 'Scelte dal creatore'
Code at /app/frontend/app/league/create.tsx line 249-272 renders all 3 options

test_11_admin_panel_import_button.description: Admin panel shows 'Importa Partite Reali' button for API-type leagues
evidence: ImportFixtures component rendered for API-type leagues

critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py correctly adds 'api' to match_source_type checks in ~10 places
fixtures_router /import endpoint has proper permission checks: super admin or league owner of API-type league
Admin V3 leagues endpoint correctly sets _can_manage_matches=true for 'api' source type
Frontend create.tsx correctly renders all 3 source type options
Frontend admin/index.tsx correctly shows ImportFixtures for API-type leagues
seed_data_creation: Test creates TEST_API_League leagues during pytest runs
context_for_next_testing_agent: API League Fixtures Import feature fully tested. Backend: Owner of API-type league can access fixtures endpoints and import into their own league. Non-owners blocked (403). Super admin can import anywhere. Admin V3 shows API leagues with _can_manage_matches=true. Frontend: League creation form shows all 3 source options (national, api, custom). Admin panel shows ImportFixtures for API-type leagues (condition at line 788). Key endpoints: GET /api/admin/real-fixtures/leagues, GET /api/admin/real-fixtures/search, POST /api/admin/real-fixtures/import.

verified_endpoints.GET /api/admin/real-fixtures/leagues: Returns API-Football leagues (200 for any authenticated user)
verified_endpoints.GET /api/admin/real-fixtures/search: Returns fixtures from API-Football (200 for any authenticated user)
verified_endpoints.POST /api/admin/real-fixtures/import: Imports fixtures (200 for owner/admin, 403 for non-owner)
verified_endpoints.GET /api/admin/v3/leagues: Returns leagues with _can_manage_matches flag for API-type
